product_overview: A user dashboard platform enabling authenticated users to manage profiles, view their children's reading statistics, and track read books via a seamless interface.
core_goals: Ensure reliable user authentication and session handling for secure access.
Provide a comprehensive user dashboard displaying profile and children reading data.
Support management of child profiles including listing and stats presentation.
Enable fetching and displaying of books read by each child to track reading progress.
Resolve PC environment loading issues on the MyPage user dashboard to ensure smooth UX.
key_features: Supabase Auth-based user authentication and session management.
MyPage user dashboard with profile overview and child listing.
Reading statistics visualization per child within the dashboard.
Child profile management including add, edit, and list functionalities.
Display of detailed lists of books read by children.
Responsive UI implemented with Next.js and Tailwind CSS to support desktop environments.
user_flow_summary: User logs in using Supabase authentication.
Upon login, user navigates to MyPage dashboard.
Dashboard loads user profile and list of children.
User views reading stats and list of books read by each child.
User manages child profiles through the dashboard interface.
User logs out to end session.
validation_criteria: User authentication completes successfully and maintains session.
MyPage dashboard loads fully and correctly in PC and desktop environments without hanging or infinite loading states.
User profile, children list, and reading stats correctly display accurate data from the backend.
Read books list fetches and renders properly for each child.
UI adapts responsively with Tailwind CSS styling ensuring usability on desktop.
No critical errors or crashes occur during mentioned user flows.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication and session management using Supabase Auth.

features.name: MyPage
features.description: User dashboard displaying profile, children list, and reading stats. Includes child profile management.

features.name: Read Books
features.description: Functionality to fetch and display books read by a child.
